turns.user_message: I tried to cheer myself up today, but it didn't really work. I just ended up feeling worse about myself.
This keeps happening whenever I try to feel better about myself. I'm starting to think I don't deserve to be happy.
I feel like a failure for failing at feeling better. It's proof I'm broken and nothing can fix me.

generation_metadata.diversity_anchor: The speaker opens with a failed attempt to feel better. This has been going on for a while.
